about.title: About Flyttella in Vasastan
about.desktop: Flyttella has been operating for over 8 years and helped 8,000 customers with moves in the Stockholm area. In Vasastan we focus on apartments in central neighborhoods, from historic buildings at Odenplan to modern buildings at Sankt Eriksplan. We're used to navigating dense urban areas, planning carry routes in older stairwells and handling moves where elevator bookings and limited parking are important factors.
about.desktop2: Our crews in Vasastan work efficiently in apartment buildings where residents value punctuality and discretion. We coordinate elevator bookings in older buildings, plan carry routes in historic stairwells and secure parking permits in central areas. Packing, storage, cleaning and assembly are bundled with one dedicated coordinator who keeps the timeline together.
about.desktop3: Every move in Vasastan includes complimentary box loans, free rescheduling up to 24 hours before move day and a 14-day guarantee on cleaning services. Support can give concrete advice on elevator bookings in older buildings, parking permits in central areas and how to navigate Vasastan's dense housing structure.

servicesSection.title: Discover all our services in Vasastan
servicesSection.description: Household moves for apartments, packing, storage, cleaning, assembly and advisory services. We handle elevator bookings, parking and logistics in Vasastan's different neighborhoods.

blogSection.title: Guides and tips for moving in Vasastan
blogSection.description: Pre-book elevators, label boxes by room, reserve parking permits and plan extra time in central areas or near public transport.

blog.title: Checklist: moving in Vasastan
blog.description: Verify elevator bookings, door codes and parking permits, secure protection for stairs and floors and check building rules before move day.

processSection.title: Our process
processSection.subtitle: How it works
processSection.description: Our moving process is simple, transparent and safe: fill out the form, get a quote within a minute, get personal follow-up the same day and sign digitally when everything feels right. The quote is based on your actual conditions — living area, floors, elevator, parking distance — and can be supplemented with packing, cleaning or storage without hidden fees.

process.fillFormDesc: Describe addresses, date, floors, elevator rules, parking and if basement/attic should be emptied. Specify desired additional services.
process.quickQuoteDesc: You get a fixed quote with clear scope and RUT deduction where applicable. If inspection is needed we book it before finalizing the price.
process.signConfirmDesc: After signing we book elevator/loading zone, arrange parking permits and send route plan with contact details.
process.personalContactDesc: Your coordinator keeps you updated, tips on packing and ensures protection and boxes are delivered on time.
process.moveCompletedDesc: The team protects entrances, builds carry chains via stairs or elevator and loads sequentially for quick unloading.
process.satisfiedCustomerDesc: We do a joint walkthrough, adjust furniture placement and ensure cleaning or storage matches the plan.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about moving in Vasastan

items.question: How do you plan moves in central apartment buildings with limited parking?
items.answer: We do site visits, secure elevator bookings in older buildings, plan carry routes in historic stairwells and coordinate parking permits in central areas to adapt to the city's dense urban environment.

items.question: Can you help with packing an entire home?
items.answer: Yes, our packing teams label boxes by room, protect kitchenware and closets and can also pack storage or hobby rooms.

items.question: What's included in your moving service?
items.answer: We handle everything from packing and transport to unpacking and cleaning. All prices are fixed without hidden fees, and we offer complimentary box loans and free rescheduling up to 24 hours before.

items.question: Do you offer storage if move-in is delayed?
items.answer: Absolutely, we store in alarmed, dry warehouses and deliver back when the new home is ready.

items.question: How far in advance should I book a move in Vasastan?
items.answer: During peak season we recommend 3–4 weeks, otherwise often 1–2 weeks is enough. We always try to solve quick requests.
